name: xuebaos
description: XueBaOS.com — The Operating System for Becoming a Study God

scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:api && npm run deploy:web
scripts.deploy:web: cd apps/web && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name xuebaos
scripts.db:migrate:local: cd apps/api && npx wrangler d1 execute xuebaos-db --local --file=./drizzle/migrations/*.sql
scripts.db:migrate:prod: cd apps/api && npx wrangler d1 execute xuebaos-db --file=./drizzle/migrations/*.sql
scripts.typecheck: cd apps/web && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../api && npx tsc --noEmit
